message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Retro docs done, CI green, shutting down">
Retrospective document changes are committed, pushed, and CI green (commit 3f0c07e). 9/9 consensus achieved. Task complete. Shutting down the team now. Great work everyone.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Understood. The retrospective changes are committed and verified. Good to see all 9 team members reached consensus -- that's exactly the kind of process discipline these changes are designed to reinforce.

input.content: Acknowledged. Glad to see the retro changes landed cleanly with full consensus. Ready to shut down.
input.summary: Acknowledged task complete, ready to shut down

routing.summary: Acknowledged task complete, ready to shut down
